message:
fix(web): Use setTransform for back buffer DPR restore in CanvasSequenceGridRenderer

Same HiDPI fix pattern as previous commit - use setTransform() instead of
scale() when restoring DPR scaling after back buffer copy to prevent
transform accumulation on re-renders.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
